name: Cream of Broccoli Soup (Robbins)
recipeInstructions:
(From "May All Be Fed," John Robbins. William Morrow; 1992; $23)
1. Put the cashews and 1 cup of the vegetable stock into a blender.
Blend until smooth, about 1 minute.
2. Put the remaining 4 cups vegetable stock, the potatoes and the onion
into a large pot. Bring to a simmer, cover and cook for 5 minutes.
3. Stir in the broccoli and basil and return to a simmer. Cover and cook
until the potatoes are tender, about 10 minutes.
4. Stir in the reserved cashew mixture, the salt, the pepper and bring just
to a simmer. Remove from the heat, transfer about half of the soup to a blender
and puree. Return the puree to the pot and stir well.
5. Serve immediately.
